title: Share Campaign
postconditions: A read-only access link is generated

main_scenario.action: GM selects the sharing option for an active campaign
System generates a unique, read-only URL
GM provides this URL to Campaign Viewers (UCH-002)
Viewers access the URL to see the timeline, public events, and current scenes

acceptance_criteria: The generated link provides read-only access.
Viewers cannot modify Ticks, Scenes, Events, or trigger Encounters.
